rawAssistant: Heard there's been some strange lights on the north road, folks saying it's the glow of old ruins. Might be worth a look if you're looking for answers about that lowland glow. Just had one traveler come in, claimed they saw something move out of the corner of their eye when they were passing by. Course, we all know what really moves at night in Hollowfen...
